name: Executive Briefcase Pro
description: Crafted for modern professionals, the Executive Briefcase Pro combines premium PU leather with a structured business design. It features a dedicated 15.6-inch laptop compartment, multiple organizer pockets, RFID-safe storage, reinforced handles, and a detachable shoulder strap. Perfect for office meetings, business travel, and carrying documents in style while maintaining a professional appearance.

name: Urban Office Messenger
description: Designed for professionals who prefer a smart casual look, the Urban Office Messenger offers a slim profile with premium leather construction. It includes a padded laptop compartment, quick-access front organizer, adjustable shoulder strap, and secure zip pockets. Ideal for daily office commutes, client meetings, and carrying work essentials comfortably.

name: Metro Business Briefcase
description: The Metro Business Briefcase is built for executives who value sophistication and functionality. Made from genuine leather, it features a spacious laptop compartment, dedicated document section, premium metal hardware, anti-theft zipper pockets, and reinforced stitching. Its elegant design makes it an excellent companion for business meetings and corporate travel.

name: WorkMate Office Bag
description: WorkMate Office Bag is designed for everyday professionals seeking practicality and comfort. Constructed from durable Oxford fabric, it offers a dedicated laptop sleeve, USB charging port, spacious compartments, and multiple organizer pockets. Lightweight yet durable, it is perfect for office commutes, hybrid work, and business travel.

name: Elite Corporate Briefcase
description: A luxury business briefcase crafted from premium leather with exceptional attention to detail. The Elite Corporate Briefcase includes a padded laptop section, RFID protection, hidden security pocket, premium lining, reinforced handles, and elegant metal accents. Designed for executives who demand style, durability, and superior organization.

name: Prime Office Messenger
description: Prime Office Messenger delivers a perfect blend of business elegance and everyday functionality. Featuring premium PU leather, a padded laptop sleeve, organized storage compartments, adjustable shoulder strap, and secure zip closures, it is ideal for professionals who frequently travel between office, meetings, and coworking spaces.

name: Vision Executive Bag
description: The Vision Executive Bag is built for managers and professionals who need organized storage without compromising style. It features a spacious laptop compartment, USB charging support, anti-theft pocket, luggage sleeve, and premium water-resistant fabric. Its sleek modern design makes it suitable for office work and business trips alike.

name: Business Elite Carry Bag
description: Designed for entrepreneurs and business leaders, the Business Elite Carry Bag combines luxury leather construction with smart organization. It features dedicated compartments for laptops, files, chargers, and business accessories, along with reinforced stitching and premium hardware for long-lasting durability and executive style.

name: Professional Office Tote
description: Professional Office Tote offers a modern minimalist design with spacious storage for laptops, documents, and daily essentials. Crafted from premium canvas with water-resistant coating, it includes multiple organizer pockets, comfortable carry handles, and a lightweight structure, making it an ideal companion for office professionals and everyday business use.

name: Executive Plus Briefcase
description: The Executive Plus Briefcase represents premium craftsmanship with full-grain leather construction and sophisticated styling. Featuring a dedicated 16-inch laptop compartment, RFID-safe pocket, premium organizers, reinforced handles, detachable shoulder strap, and elegant interior lining, it is designed for senior executives and frequent business travelers seeking luxury and performance.
